wintersolstice00.name: Winter Solstice
wintersolstice00.description: Longest night of the year, marking the turning point of winter across the Five Nations.

dayofmourning000.name: Day of Mourning
dayofmourning000.description: Annual remembrance of the destruction of Cyre on 20 Olarune 994 YK, when an unknown cataclysm transformed the kingdom into the Mournland.

brightblade00000.name: Brightblade
brightblade00000.description: Holy day of Dol Dorn, Sovereign Lord of Strength and Steel.

aureonscrown0000.name: Aureon's Crown
aureonscrown0000.description: Celebration of knowledge where elders share wisdom with the young at evening feasts.

sunsblessing0000.name: Sun's Blessing
sunsblessing0000.description: Holy day of Dol Arrah when armies traditionally kept the peace.

bakersnight00000.name: Baker's Night
bakersnight00000.description: Festival celebrating hearth, home, and the simple comforts that sustain communities.

foundersday00000.name: Founder's Day
foundersday00000.description: Commemoration of the founding of the Kingdom of Galifar.

feastofthemoon00.name: Feast of the Moon
feastofthemoon00.description: Nighttime celebration honoring the twelve moons of Eberron.

boldreishearth00.name: Boldrei's Hearth
boldreishearth00.description: Holy day honoring Boldrei, goddess of community, family, and the warmth of home.

throneholdday000.name: Thronehold Day
throneholdday000.description: Anniversary of the Treaty of Thronehold signed on 11 Aryth 996 YK, formally ending the Last War.

longshadows00000.name: Long Shadows
longshadows00000.description: Three nights when dark magic dominates and most people stay indoors.

throneday0000000.name: Throne Day
throneday0000000.description: Celebration of rulership and governance, honoring the authority of legitimate monarchs.

forgefire0000000.name: Forge Fire
forgefire0000000.description: Festival celebrating craftsmanship, artifice, and the transformative power of creation.
